title: Examination of Theses Related to School Climate
author: Demir
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Schools, which are one of the important institutions for countries and societies, must have a positive school climate in order to be productive. The aim of this study is to examine the postgraduate theses prepared on school climate according to the year, type, study group, method used, data collection tool, data analysis, sampling technique, subject and school type variables. The method of the research is document analysis method. Criterion sampling technique was used because the theses examined in the study were determined according to some criteria. Data were collected by examining 50 postgraduate theses. In the analysis of the data, content analysis was performed by giving frequency and percentages. According to the results of the research, the majority of theses were prepared between 2019-2022 and they are master's theses. Simple random sampling technique was used as the teachers sampling technique as the study group. In theses, quantitative research was used as research type, relational survey as method, scale as data collection tool and correlation and predictive analysis as analysis. The subject of study of theses is mainly leadership styles. In the theses, 30 different subjects, which are discussed in relation to school climate, have been determined as study subjects.
